projectDescription: An interactive digital book built with Next.js and React Three Fiber, featuring six creative experiences designed by and for children at Platohedro — spanning sound seeds, 3D character galleries, watercolor painting, lava lamp experiments, a self-care board game, and an animal slot machine.
keyFeatures: Six interactive creative experiences for children
3D character gallery using React Three Fiber and FBX models
Web Audio API-powered sound seeds with real-time playback control
Canvas 2D watercolor painting with color mixing and PNG export
Interactive lava lamp simulation with custom shaders
45-square cooperative self-care board game with dice animation
Animal slot machine (Animalario) combining creature parts randomly
Sticker-style visual design system with pastel shadow offsets
Responsive layout with sticky navigation and smooth section scrolling
publicApiSurface: GET /api/semillas — returns manifest of sound seed assets
SemillasSonoras component — interactive audio seed gallery
GaleriaPersonajes component — 3D character viewer with OrbitControls
Acuarela component — Canvas 2D watercolor painting tool
LavaLampLab component — shader-based lava lamp simulation
AutoCuidadoBoard component — 45-square board game with dice
Slot777Vertical component — animal parts slot machine
ThemedSection component — section layout wrapper with highlights
TopNav component — sticky navigation with chapters dropdown
sticker-card CSS utility — pastel offset shadow card style
sticker-button CSS utility — pill-shaped interactive button style
